description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic walking pose. The figure is slender and appears to be wearing a fitted jacket over a shirt, with long pants that have a straight cut. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, suggesting mid-stride movement. The head is slightly tilted, and the legs are positioned to indicate a natural walking gait. The overall silhouette is realistic, with attention to anatomical proportions and subtle clothing folds.
description: A slender adult pedestrian in a walking pose, wearing a fitted jacket and straight-cut pants, with arms and legs positioned mid-stride.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the forward-swinging arm, with clear visibility of the jacket's front and the stride.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the bent arm swinging back, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, the trailing leg, and the overall posture from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the forward leg and arm more prominent, and the side of the torso visible.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket over a shirt and straight-cut pants
